description_long: This is a McChicken hamburger wrapped in branded yellowish paper, featuring blue printed text and graphics, including the McDonald's logo and a chicken illustration. The wrapper is crumpled and tightly encloses the hamburger, obscuring the contents inside. The visible text indicates the product is made with chicken and highlights its quality and taste. The paper has a slightly glossy, waxed appearance, with some creases and folds visible throughout. The bottom of the object is a solid brown color, likely representing the base of the hamburger or a simplified scan. No internal ingredients such as lettuce, sauce, or patty are visible due to the intact packaging. The overall shape is rounded and slightly flattened, typical of a fast-food hamburger.
description: A McChicken hamburger tightly wrapped in yellowish branded paper with blue text and graphics, forming a rounded, crumpled shape. The contents are fully concealed by the wrapper.
description_view_0: Front view shows the McChicken wrapper with clear blue branding, logo, and chicken illustration on yellowish paper.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the crumpled, folded nature of the wrapper, with partial text and logo visible along the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a solid brown surface, likely representing the base or underside of the hamburger, with no visible text or graphics.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows more of the wrapper's folds and creases, with partial blue text and graphics visible.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Toppings are not visible as the hamburger is fully wrapped in paper, concealing any internal arrangement.
